title: Advanced Materials for Land Based Gas Turbines
abstract:
The gas turbine (Brayton) cycle is a steady ﬂow
cycle, wherein the fuel is burnt in the working ﬂuid and the
peak temperature directly depends upon the material
capabilities of the parts in contact with the hot ﬂuid. In the
gas turbine, the combustion and turbine parts are continu-
ously in contact with hot ﬂuid. The higher the ﬁring tem-
perature, higher is the turbine efﬁciency and output.
Therefore, increasing turbine inlet temperature (ﬁring
temperature) has been most signiﬁcant thrust for g
